title: The Throne Room Challenge
storySnippet: You stand before the throne of the Word Fortress. Only a true master of spelling can claim victory and earn the kingdom's seal.

data.sentenceContext: Words like 'buzz' and 'hiss' are examples of onomatopoeia in the English language.
The pharaoh of ancient Egypt commanded the construction of magnificent pyramids.
The drummer kept a steady rhythm that made everyone in the audience want to dance.
In the animal kingdom, wolves establish a clear hierarchy within the pack.
The doctor diagnosed the patient with pneumonia and prescribed antibiotics immediately.
The archaeological dig uncovered pottery fragments that were over three thousand years old.
The conscientious student always submitted her assignments ahead of the deadline.
The Renaissance was a period of great cultural and artistic achievement in Europe.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The poem used ___ to imitate the sound of rain falling on a tin roof.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: A good song needs a strong ___ to keep listeners engaged.
data.hint: No regular vowels in this word — just 'y'

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The company has a strict ___ where managers report to directors.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ site revealed artifacts from an ancient civilization.
